CDC 1.0.0 · Phase A · GWAS Pipeline · Nextflow DSL2

Genome-Wide Association
Analysis Report

Two-cohort GWAS · REGENIE LOCO · 4 quantitative + 3 binary traits · MAF/HWE/missingness/het QC · PC-corrected · Firth approximation for binary traits

MAF ≥ 0.01 HWE ≥ 0.000001 GENO ≤ 0.02 MIND ≤ 0.02 LD win=1000kb r²<0.1 20 PCs Step1 bsize=1000 Step2 bsize=400

Genomic inflation (λGC) per trait
Values near 1.0 = well-calibrated · green zone = acceptable (0.95–1.10)
Pipeline stages
StageNameToolDescriptionParameters
A1Genotype QCplink2MAF · HWE · variant missingness · sample missingness · heterozygosity outliersMAF≥0.01 · HWE≥0.000001 · GENO≤0.02 · MIND≤0.02
A2Merge cohortsplink2Merge QC-passed cohorts on common SNPs · deduplicate positions--rm-dup exclude-all
A3LD pruningplink2Global LD pruning for PCA and REGENIE Step 1win=1000kb · r²<0.1
A4PCAplink2 --pca approxPrincipal components for population stratification control20 PCs
A8REGENIE Step 1regenie --step 1Whole-genome ridge regression · LOCO predictionsbsize=1000 · --lowmem
A9REGENIE Step 2regenie --step 2Per-variant association · Firth approximation for binary traitsbsize=400 · --firth --approx
A10Harmonise sumstatsPython/pandasMR-ready format: CHR BP SNP A1 A2 BETA SE P LOG10P EAF N TRAIT COHORT7 traits × 2 cohorts
